title: sphaeroma glabratum
intro: Sphaeroma glabratum, also known as the "glabrate sphaeroma" or "isopod", is a species of crustacean that is often mistaken for a plant due to its appearance. However, it is actually a type of terrestrial isopod that belongs to the family Sphaeromatidae. I couldn't find any information on the medicinal properties or health benefits of Sphaeroma glabratum.
